title: triticum secale
intro: Triticum secale, also known as rye, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family and is a cereal crop commonly used for food and animal feed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Triticum secale include its ability to aid in digestion, lower cholesterol levels, and help manage blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Triticum secale include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
